title: Claude Sonnet 5: strong agentic performance at a higher cost per task
abstract: Claude Sonnet 5 boasts strong agentic performance, delivering tasks swiftly. Imagine ordering it to fetch the weather forecast for tomorrow and watching it materialize right before your eyes—like a scene from a movie! However, be prepared for a higher cost per task.
abstract_zh: Claude Sonnet 5像魔杖一挥，命令它查明天天气，转眼间信息就出现在眼前，简直跟魔法一样！不过友情提示，每次施法得掏更多银子，得小心别把自己变成“穷鬼”哦~
